text: Isolation of Primary Acinar Cells: After disinfecting the biosafety, C57 mice were anesthetized, and the abdominal area was sterilized. The pancreas was isolated and placed in D-PBS. The tissue was minced, digested with collagenase Ia at 37°C for 18 minutes, and the reaction was terminated. The cell suspension was gently pipetted, filtered through a 70 μm strainer, and washed with D-PBS. Cells were collected by centrifugation at 300 rpm for 2 minutes and washed three times with D-PBS. Finally, the acinar cells were resuspended in Waymouth complete medium, seeded in culture plates, and incubated at 37°C.
